mapper.select: select ci.id, ci.product_id as productId, ci.batch_id as batchId, ci.name, ci.image, ci.product_spec as productSpec, ci.number, ci.amount, ci.create_time as createTime, case when ib.id is null then 0 else greatest(ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity, 0) end as availableQuantity, ib.expiration_time as expirationTime from cart_item ci left join inventory_batch ib on ib.id = ci.batch_id where ci.user_id = #{userId} order by ci.create_time desc, ci.id desc

select ci.id, ci.product_id as productId, ci.batch_id as batchId, ci.name, ci.image, ci.product_spec as productSpec, ci.number, ci.amount, ci.create_time as createTime, case when ib.id is null then 0 else case when (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) < 0 then 0 else (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) end end as availableQuantity, ib.expiration_time as expirationTime from cart_item ci left join inventory_batch ib on ib.id = ci.batch_id where ci.user_id = #{userId} order by ci.create_time desc, ci.id desc

select id, user_id as userId, product_id as productId, batch_id as batchId, name, image, product_spec as productSpec, number, amount, create_time as createTime from cart_item where user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId} and batch_id = #{batchId} and ( (#{productSpec} is null and product_spec is null) or product_spec = #{productSpec} ) limit 1

select ci.id, ci.product_id as productId, ci.batch_id as batchId, ci.name, ci.image, ci.product_spec as productSpec, ci.number, ci.amount, ci.create_time as createTime, case when ib.id is null then 0 else greatest(ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity, 0) end as availableQuantity, ib.expiration_time as expirationTime from cart_item ci left join inventory_batch ib on ib.id = ci.batch_id where ci.id = #{id} and ci.user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select ci.id, ci.product_id as productId, ci.batch_id as batchId, ci.name, ci.image, ci.product_spec as productSpec, ci.number, ci.amount, ci.create_time as createTime, case when ib.id is null then 0 else case when (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) < 0 then 0 else (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) end end as availableQuantity, ib.expiration_time as expirationTime from cart_item ci left join inventory_batch ib on ib.id = ci.batch_id where ci.id = #{id} and ci.user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cart_item( name, image, user_id, product_id, batch_id, product_spec, number, amount, create_time ) values ( #{name}, #{image}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{batchId}, #{productSpec}, #{number}, #{amount}, #{createTime} )
